claimText: The Agrienics Programme is a national initiative of the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY).
evidenceExcerpt: A national programme of MeitY involving research, development, deployment, demonstration, and commercialization of technologies
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the nodal ministry for the Agrienics Programme.
distractorHooks: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change

claimText: The Agrienics Programme focuses on the research, development, and commercialization of technologies in the agriculture and environment domains.
evidenceExcerpt: involving research, development, deployment, demonstration, and commercialization of technologies in agriculture and environment domain.
examUse: Statement-based question on the core focus areas and objectives of the Agrienics Programme.

claimText: The Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), Kolkata is the Nodal Agency for the Agrienics Programme.
evidenceExcerpt: Nodal Agency: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), Kolkata.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question identifying the implementing or nodal agency.
distractorHooks: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR)
